Author: Minseo Jang
Title: Claude Skills: Transform Claude into an audio AI expert.
Text:
Claude Skills: Transform Claude into an audio AI expert.
I’ve always wondered why our AI assistants are mostly “deaf” to the rich context of sounds around us. To bridge this gap, I developed sense-claude, a plugin that connects Cochl.Sense’s powerful audio recognition with Claude Code.
Whether it’s monitoring CCTV audio or analyzing car engine health, AI can now “listen” and react. Just a few commands, and you’re all set.
1. Add Plugin to Claude Code
First, register the marketplace and install the sense-claude plugin.
# Add the marketplace
/plugin marketplace add meanmin/sense-claude
# Install the plugin
/plugin install cochl-sense-api
2. Set Up Python Environment
Configure the necessary environment by running the setup script for your OS.
# For macOS/Linux
./setup.sh
# For Windows
setup.bat
3. Get Your Cochl.Sense Project Key
You need an API key to enable audio recognition.
- Visit the Cochl.Sense Dashboard.
- Go to the Projects tab and select your project.
- Navigate to Settings and copy your Project Key.
4. Start Talking to Claude
Now, simply ask Claude to handle audio tasks using natural language.
- Example: “Create a dashboard that analyzes the audio from this CCTV footage and shows a timeline of detected sounds by time slot.”
I’m curious to see how you’ll push the boundaries of sense-claude. Give it a try, experiment with different audio sources, and let me know if you hit any creative breakthroughs (or bugs!).
Your feedback and stars on GitHub mean the world to me. What should Claude listen to next?”
🔗 Github repository: https://github.com/meanmin/sense-claude
